name: x-reach
description: Twitter-only Windows research integration and orchestration suite for Codex.

interface.longDescription: Bootstraps, documents, diagnoses, and exposes thin read-only Twitter/X collection plus in-session orchestration skills for explicit X Reach workflows on Windows.
defaultPrompt: Using X Reach, show me whether Twitter/X collection is ready on this machine.
Using X Reach, turn this Twitter/X research request into a bounded execution plan that keeps artifacts small.
Using X Reach, turn this rough Twitter/X research request into a structured brief.
Using X Reach, take this rough Twitter/X research ask and start the X Reach investigation.
